name: IDFC FIRST Wealth Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Other retail spends up to Rs 20,000
Dining, Travel, International, Birthday, and incremental spends above Rs 20,000
Utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway transactions

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
international: 2 complimentary international airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free credit card with zero joining and annual fees
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter
2 complimentary international airport lounge visits per quarter
4 complimentary railway lounge visits per quarter
Complimentary golf rounds and lessons (2 per month)
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket offer up to Rs 500 twice a month via District app
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 300 per statement cycle
Reward points are valid for 24 months

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of Rs 3,00,000

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
3X reward points (1.5 per Rs 100 spent) on standard spends up to Rs 20,000 per statement cycle.
10X reward points (5.0 per Rs 100 spent) on Dining, Travel, International, Birthday spends, and incremental spends above Rs 20,000.
1X reward points (0.5 per Rs 100 spent) on utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway spends.
Lounge access (airport and railway) is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
Buy 1 Get 1 movie ticket offer is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
